title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Direct - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Direct - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Direct in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Direct:
ICICI Direct is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct!
